channel.title: California on Grim Chronicle
channel.description: Recent content in California on Grim Chronicle

item.title: The Zodiac Killer: Everything We Know About America's Most Infamous Unmasked Murderer
item.description: The Zodiac Killer terrorized California in the late 1960s, sending taunting letters to police and the press. Decades later, the case remains officially unsolved. Here is everything we know.
